notes: Created Vercel serverless function at api/sync.ts. Installed @vercel/node dev dependency for types. GET validates deviceId UUID, fetches fap:{deviceId} from Redis, returns {data, syncedAt}. POST validates deviceId + data JSON, writes to Redis, returns {ok:true, syncedAt}. Error handling: try/catch all Redis calls, returns fetch_failed or write_failed with 500. tsc --noEmit exits 0.
